title: ANS11477 Four Heart Chambers
text_en: Your heart is a muscular organ made up of four chambers, the right and left atria, and the right and left ventricles.

title: ANS11477 Four Heart Chambers
text_en: During a normal heartbeat, the chambers of your heart contract and relax in a rhythmic pattern to deliver a consistent flow of blood throughout your body.

title: ANS11477 Four Heart Chambers
text_en: The right atrium collects blood from the body, and the right ventricle pumps it to the lungs, which bring oxygen to and remove carbon dioxide from the blood.

title: ANS11477 Four Heart Chambers
text_en:
At the same time, the left atrium receives blood from the lungs, and the left ventricle pumps it out to supply your body's tissues with oxygen and nutrients.

---

**切分依据（4 blocks）：**

| Block | 画面动作 | 内容 |
|-------|---------|------|
| 1 | 心脏结构展示 | 介绍心脏四腔结构（右/左心房、右/左心室） |
| 2 | 心跳节律动画 | 心腔收缩-舒张的整体泵血机制 |
| 3 | 右心血流路径 | 右心房收集体循环血→右心室泵向肺→气体交换 |
| 4 | 左心血流路径 | 左心房接收肺血→左心室泵向全身→供氧供能 |

> Block 3 与 4 虽然文本说 "At the same time"，但画面上右心通路和左心通路通常分步演示，故拆为两个 block。
